page: Vultr voc-g-2c-8gb-50s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance featuring 2 shared vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture at a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz, the system includes 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage is provided via a local 50 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results indicate a divergence between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The instance achieves top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, placing in the top 10%. However, multi-core CPU performance drops to the middle 50% average. Memory bandwidth for large blocks is average, but small-block cached read-only bandwidth is weak, falling in the bottom 25%. Passmark CPU, database operations, and Redis SET operations also rank in the bottom 25%, while static web serving throughput is poor, landing in the bottom 10%.

Due to its shared CPU allocation, this instance presents a resource-density tradeoff, making it highly cost-efficient for workloads that do not require continuous, dedicated CPU performance. It is suited for general-purpose applications, light web serving, development environments, and small-scale database testing where high-throughput performance is not critical.
description: Vultr voc-g-2c-8gb-50s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance featuring 2 shared AMD EPYC Milan vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, running at 2.0 GHz. It is configured with 8.0 GB of RAM and 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Performance benchmarks reveal a strong single-core CPU capability, ranking in the top 10% in stress-ng tests, though multi-core performance and database operations fall into the average and weak categories respectively. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and shared CPU resources, this instance offers a cost-effective solution for general-purpose workloads. It is best suited for development environments, light web serving, and low-intensity background tasks that do not require sustained, dedicated compute power.
og_description: Vultr voc-g-2c-8gb-50s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance featuring 2 shared AMD EPYC Milan vCPUs, 8 GB of RAM, and 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual server featuring shared AMD EPYC processors and local NVMe SSD storage for budget-conscious workloads.

8.0 GB of system memory and 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
Cost-effective shared CPU allocation for budget-conscious deployments
